candidate_lesson: A SHORT with 4 of 6 signal layers FAILING (✗ HTF bias against macro, ✗ no OB/FVG zone entry, ✗ no CHOCH/BOS structure shift) should be vetoed regardless of a strong rate_diff_z — the single confirmed liquidity sweep + FVG presence is not enough confluence to override structural disagreement.
testable_rule: if direction contradicts market_structure_bias AND no CHOCH/BOS in trade direction AND not price_at_OB_or_FVG_zone: veto trade regardless of rate_diff_z magnitude
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
